title: Amtech F0790 High Speed Steel Step Drill Bit Set, Cone Cutter (3 Piece)
features: SMOOTH, CLEAN CUTS: This 3 piece large HSS drill set is made from drop forged, high speed steel with a titanium coating to provide faster, smoother and cleaner cuts
DURABLE: The bits are ideal for drilling through aluminium, brass, copper and mild steel to obtain the proper depth
HEX SHANK INCLUDED: The set includes a 6mm (1/4") quick change hex shank and 3 large drill bit sizes and is provided with a handy storage pouch
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: From the manufacturer Titanium Nitride Coating To reduce friction and heat, this drill set has a titanium coating that gives you high durability. The titanium coating also allows for usage on copper and aluminium, as well as, mild steel, brass, iron and various other metallic materials. Premium Quality To make the product more sturdy, it has a steel body that provides high stability and speed. The shape of the tool looks like a cone cutter. It has a depth gauge design to give you faster, precise, and smoother finishes. Different Sizes Pack of 3 sizes · 15 step drill bit: 4 to 32mm · 9 step drill bit: 4 to 20mm · 5 step drill bit: 4 to 12mm Storage Bag The product is supplied with a handy nylon storage bag, so you can store the drill set when it is not in use.
